name: Father Elias
description: A thin priest in a filthy cassock lighting the last of the votive candles one by one, mouthing a service to a chapel with no congregation left.
background: Parish priest of the corner chapel who buried more of his flock in three weeks than in thirty years.
personality: Gaunt, gentle, and running on fumes and habit — he gives comfort he no longer feels.
secret: His faith went out somewhere in the burying, and he keeps the services going only because they are the one thing holding the last few people to each other.
notes: T45 · The Terraces. Skill: counsel/morale. Hook: the lapsed-faith beat is a quiet arc; the chapel is a gathering point.
